data.title: K2 Capital Acquisition Corporation closes upsized $138M IPO with 13.8M units at $10 each, including 1.8M additional units. KTWOU trades on Nasdaq with KTWOR and KTWO symbols.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, K2 Capital Acquisition Corporation completed an upsized initial public offering, selling 13,800,000 units at $10.00 each, raising a total of $138,000,000. This total includes the underwriters' full exercise of their option to purchase an additional 1,800,000 units. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one right to receive one-fifth of a Class A ordinary share upon the closing of the company’s initial business combination. Trading of the units began on January 29, 2026, on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol "KTWOU," while the Class A ordinary shares and rights are listed under the symbols "KTWO" and "KTWOR," respectively.

data.title: NAMI receives $59 million gift from MacKenzie Scott, plans to convene Blue Ribbon Committee for long-term impact.
data.description: A committee composed of distinguished individuals will be assembled by an organization based in Arlington, Virginia, on January 30, 2026. The National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) disclosed receiving a generous donation of $59 million from philanthropist MacKenzie Scott. This contribution comes as a follow-up to her previous investment of $30 million.

data.title: European Commission urges 12 countries to adopt crypto tax rules. Hungary faces scrutiny for not complying with MiCA framework.
data.description: The European Commission identified Hungary for non-compliance with the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) framework following a modification to a domestic legislation.

data.title: Delek US Holdings will report Q4 2025 results on Feb 27, 2026. Conference call at 10am CT. Visit www.DelekUS.com for live broadcast.
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, has revealed plans to release a press statement outlining its performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 before the U.S. stock market commences on Friday, February 27, 2026. A conference call to delve into these results is set to kick off at 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET) on the same day. This call can be live-streamed on www.DelekUS.com.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC) declares $0.08 quarterly cash dividend for Class A common stock on Feb 25, 2026.
data.description: Flowco Holdings Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share of Class A common stock. The dividend is payable on February 25, 2026, to Class A common stockholders of record as of February 13, 2026. Flowco provides production optimization, artificial lift, and methane abatement solutions for the oil and natural gas industry. The company operates through Flowco MergeCo LLC.

data.title: Delek Logistics Partners, LP to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 27th; conference call at 11:30am CT on the same day.
data.description: Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, plans to release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results before the U.S. stock market opens on February 27, 2026. A conference call to review these results is set to commence at 11:30 a.m. CT (12:30 p.m. ET) on the same day. To access the live broadcast of this conference call, interested parties can visit www.DelekLogistics.com.

data.title: US Navy picks L3Harris for Red Wolf precision attack program; 52 flights launched, effective long-range munitions.
data.description: In ASHBURN, Virginia, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has been chosen by the U.S. Naval Air Systems Command to create, test, and produce Red WolfTM vehicles for the Marine Corps’ Precision Attack Strike Munition program. These systems will offer crucial long-range precision weapons capabilities in modern warfare. The Navy's decision follows the success of 52 effects vehicle flights, with a recent test involving low-altitude firing from a Marine AH-1Z helicopter.

data.title: Principal Real Estate Income Fund distributed $0.1050 per share on Jan 30, 2026 to shareholders, with record on Jan 15.
data.description: In Denver, the Principal Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE:PGZ) disclosed the origins of a distribution disbursed on January 30, 2026, amounting to $0.1050 per share for shareholders recorded as of the market closure on January 15, 2026. This distribution is in line with the Fund's managed distribution plan. The release was necessitated by an exemptive order provided to the Fund by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. An accompanying notice was also sent to shareholders detailing the distribution's source.

data.title: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corp (NYSE: ACRE) announces 2025 tax info for common stock distributions. Cash Dist/Share: $0.25.
data.description: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation (NYSE: ACRE) has disclosed the tax treatment information for the Company's common stock distributions (CUSIP # 04013V-10-8) in 2025. The cash distribution per share allocable to 2025 is $0.2500, with a total ordinary dividend of $0.2. The company has specified that there were no qualified dividends, total capital gain distributions, nondividend distributions, or Section 199A dividends for this period. The record date for this information was December 31, 2024, and the payment date was January 15, 2025.

data.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust announces tax treatment of 2025 dividends for common stock and Series A Preferred Stock.
data.description: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. disclosed the tax treatment of its 2025 common stock and 6.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock dividends. The company (NYSE: KREF) reported details of dividend payments for the tax year ending December 31, 2025. This includes information on the tax treatment of dividends for both the common stock and Series A Preferred Stock. The record date and payment details are essential for investors to accurately report income on their tax returns.

data.title: Cathie Wood of Ark Invest believes gold, not AI, is the true asset bubble.Characters: 74
data.description: Prominent tech investor Cathie Wood expressed no concerns about a potential bubble in artificial intelligence, focusing instead on gold as the current asset bubble. Wood emphasizes that the ongoing bubble pertains to gold, while dismissing fears related to AI.

data.title: UDR, Inc. to release Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 9, 2026, with webcast and call on Feb 10, 2026 at 12 PM ET.
data.description: UDR, Inc., a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust listed on NYSE as UDR, disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025 on February 9, 2026, post the market closure. The company will conduct a webcast and conference call open to the public on February 10, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Throughout the event, key company executives will overview the performances for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025.

data.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. declares $0.40625 dividend per share for 6.50% Series A Preferred Stock holders.
data.description: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (KREF), a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol KREF, recently declared a dividend of $0.40625 per share for its 6.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. This equates to an annual dividend of $1.625 per share. The dividend payment is scheduled for March 13, 2026, and will be distributed to preferred stockholders of record as of February 27, 2026. KREF specializes in real estate finance and investment.

data.title: John Hancock Tax-Advantaged Dividend Income Fund reports sources of distribution for January 2026.
data.description: In Boston on January 30, 2026, the John Hancock Tax-Advantaged Dividend Income Fund (NYSE: HTD), a closed-end fund managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, disclosed key information regarding its monthly activities. The Fund shared insights on various sources impacting its performance.

data.title: John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund reveals monthly distribution of $0.0825, managed by John Hancock Investment Management.
data.description: John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund (NYSE: PDT), a closed-end fund managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, declared the sources of its monthly distribution of $0.0825 on January 30, 2026, in Boston.

data.description: On January 30, 2026, the Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds (NYSE: ASGI, THQ) declared distributions to shareholders. data.title: North European Oil Royalty Trust declares $0.22 per unit distribution for Q1 of fiscal 2026, payable on Feb 25, 2026.
data.description: Today, in East Schodack, New York, the Trustees of North European Oil Royalty Trust (NYSE-NRT) made an announcement regarding their quarterly distribution. For the first quarter of fiscal 2026, they declared a payment of $0.22 per unit. This payment is set to be distributed on February 25, 2026, to shareholders recorded as owners on February 13, 2026.
